scripts.check: bun run check:public-agent && bun run check:soc2-register
scripts.check:public-agent: bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution Bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --types bun scripts/*.ts
scripts.check:soc2-register: bun scripts/soc2-register.ts verify && bun scripts/soc2-register.ts check
